zh.lifeSummary: 當William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham於1210年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾文特林加姆時，他的父親Robert Marmion29歲，母親Juliane de Vassi30歲。他於1248年6月7日與Loretta FitzRoy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1264年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1275年7月27日在英國林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾享年65歲，埋葬在英國肯特爾哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham于1210年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾文特林加姆时，他的父亲Robert Marmion29岁，母亲Juliane de Vassi30岁。他于1248年6月7日与Loretta FitzRoy结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1264年被列为member of parliament。他去世于1275年7月27日在英国林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾享年65岁，埋葬在英国肯特爾哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Marmion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: perhaps an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name. Compare   Merriman  .
English (Lancashire; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French marmion ‘monkey, brat’.

variants.name: Merriman
meanings: nickname from Middle English mirie, merie, murie ‘merry, pleasant’ + man ‘man’. Compare Merry 1. This surname is established in Ireland (perhaps as an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name; compare Marmion ) as well as England.

there has probably been some confusion with Marriman, probably an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’, or perhaps a pet form of Mary using the hypocoristic suffix -man. The surname Marriman is now vanishingly rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marmon
meanings: variant of Marriman, an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham was born in 1210, in Winteringham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Marmion, was 29 and his mother, Juliane de Vassi, was 30. He married Loretta FitzRoy on 7 June 1248. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1264, at the age of 54, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died on 27 July 1275, in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Chilham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham est né en 1210, à Winteringham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Marmion, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Juliane de Vassi, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Loretta FitzRoy le 7 juin 1248. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1264, à l’âge de 54 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé le 27 juillet 1275, à Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Chilham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham 1210 in Winteringham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Marmion 29 und seine Mutter Juliane de Vassi 30. Er hat am 7. Juni 1248 Loretta FitzRoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1264, als er 54 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. Juli 1275 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Chilham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham è nato il nel 1210 nel Winteringham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Marmion, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Juliane de Vassi, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Loretta FitzRoy il 7 giugno 1248. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1264, all'età di 54 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì il 27 luglio 1275, nel Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Chilham, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringhamが1210年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウィンテリンガムで生まれた時，父Robert Marmionは29歳，母Juliane de Vassiは30歳であった。1248年6月7日にLoretta FitzRoyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1264年，54歳の時，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1275年7月27日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールンカストルで65歳で死去し，イギリスケントチルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham(이)가 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 윈테링함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Marmion(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliane de Vassi(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1248년 6월 7일 Loretta FitzRoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1264년, 54세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1275년 7월 27일 영국 링코실르 호른카스틀에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 치함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham nasceu em 1210, em Winteringham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Marmion, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Juliane de Vassi, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Loretta FitzRoy em 7 de junho de 1248. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1264, com 54 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu em 27 de julho de 1275, em Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Chilham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham родился в 1210 г. в местности винтирингхам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Marmion было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliane de Vassi, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Loretta FitzRoy 7 июня 1248 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1264 году, в возрасте 54 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер 27 июля 1275 г. в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности чилхам, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham nació en 1210, en Winteringham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Marmion, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Juliane de Vassi, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Loretta FitzRoy el 7 de junio de 1248. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1264, a la edad de 54 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament. Murió el 27 de julio de 1275, en Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Chilham, Kent, Inglaterra.
